# ctyun_iam_users (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10345725/10355289



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_iam_users" "users" {
  page_no   = 1
  page_size = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `page_no` (Number) 当前页码
- `page_size` (Number) 每页显示数量

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) 用户列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) 账户ID
- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `email` (String) 用户邮箱
- `enabled` (Boolean) 用户状态
- `groups` (Attributes Set) 关联的用户组列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users--groups))
- `is_root` (Boolean) 是否主用户
- `name` (String) 用户名
- `phone` (String) 手机号
- `user_id` (String) 用户ID

<a id="nestedatt--users--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users.groups`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) 用户组信息
- `id` (String) 用户组id
- `name` (String) 用户组名称
